<TOOL_RESULT>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "4da70f01-a3da-406e-82d5-bd32028bea4c", "result": "{"blocks":[{"block_type":"text","text":"Command was executed partially, but reported warnings or errors:\n[Log] Instantiated XR Origin.\n[Log] Added [CourseSelectionUI] component.\n[Error] System.ArgumentException: Object at index 0 is null\r\n  at (wrapper managed-to-native) UnityEditor.SerializedObject.InternalCreate_Injected(UnityEngine.Object[],intptr)\r\n  at UnityEditor.SerializedObject.InternalCreate (UnityEngine.Object[] monoObjs, UnityEngine.Object context) [0x00007] in <fa95cb502fe343b2a567dd611b37cd92>:0 \r\n  at UnityEditor.SerializedObject..ctor (UnityEngine.Object obj) [0x00006] in <fa95cb502fe343b2a567dd611b37cd92>:0 \r\n  at Unity.AI.Assistant.Agent.Dynamic.Extension.Editor.CommandScript.Execute (Unity.AI.Assistant.Agent.Dynamic.Extension.Editor.ExecutionResult result) [0x00188] in <698cf5b941ea4dcdacac3338cf98bea3>:0 \r\n  at Unity.AI.Assistant.Editor.RunCommand.AgentRunCommand.Execute (Unity.AI.Assistant.Agent.Dynamic.Extension.Editor.ExecutionResult& executionResult, System.String title) [0x00019] in .\\Library\\PackageCache\\com.unity.ai.assistant@1311ffcbb798\\Editor\\Assistant\\RunCommand\\AgentRunCommand.cs:46 \nConsider reverting changes that may have happened if you retry."}],"tool_name":"Unity.RunCommand","raw_input":{"code":"using UnityEngine;\nusing UnityEditor;\nusing UnityEditor.SceneManagement;\nusing UnityEngine.UIElements;\nusing System.Linq;\n\ninternal class CommandScript : IRunCommand\n{\n    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)\n    {\n        string scenePath = \"Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity\";\n        var scene = EditorSceneManager.NewScene(NewSceneSetup.DefaultGameObjects, NewSceneMode.Single);\n        \n        // 1. Setup Camera (XR Origin)\n        string xrOriginPath = \"Assets/VRTemplateAssets/Prefabs/Setup/Complete XR Origin Set Up Variant.prefab\";\n        GameObject xrOriginPrefab = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(xrOriginPath);\n        if (xrOriginPrefab != null)\n        {\n            GameObject mainCam = GameObject.Find(\"Main Camera\");\n            if (mainCam != null) result.DestroyObject(mainCam);\n            GameObject xrOrigin = (GameObject)PrefabUtility.InstantiatePrefab(xrOriginPrefab);\n            xrOrigin.transform.position = Vector3.zero;\n            result.RegisterObjectCreation(xrOrigin);\n            result.Log(\"Instantiated XR Origin.\");\n        }\n\n        // 2. Setup UI\n        GameObject uiObj = new GameObject(\"VRCourseSelectionUI\");\n        uiObj.transform.position = new Vector3(0, 1.5f, 2.5f);\n        uiObj.transform.localScale = new Vector3(0.001f, 0.001f, 0.001f); // 1px = 1mm\n\n        UIDocument uiDoc = uiObj.AddComponent<UIDocument>();\n        \n        // Find Script\n        System.Type scriptType = null;\n        foreach (var assembly in System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies())\n        {\n            scriptType = assembly.GetType(\"CourseSelectionUI\");\n            if (scriptType != null) break;\n        }\n\n        if (scriptType != null)\n        {\n            Component logic = uiObj.AddComponent(scriptType);\n            result.Log(\"Added {0} component.\", scriptType.Name);\n            \n            VisualTreeAsset uxml = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTreeAsset>(\"Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uxml\");\n            StyleSheet uss = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<StyleSheet>(\"Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uss\");\n            \n            if (uxml != null)\n            {\n                SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(logic);\n                so.FindProperty(\"courseSelectionTree\").objectReferenceValue = uxml;\n                if (uss != null) so.FindProperty(\"courseSelectionStyle\").objectReferenceValue = uss;\n                so.ApplyModifiedProperties();\n                uiDoc.visualTreeAsset = uxml;\n                result.Log(\"Linked UXML and USS.\");\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 3. Panel Settings (Safely)\n        string panelPath = \"Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/VRCourseSelectionPanelSettings.asset\";\n        PanelSettings panelSettings = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<PanelSettings>(panelPath);\n        if (panelSettings == null)\n        {\n            panelSettings = ScriptableObject.CreateInstance<PanelSettings>();\n            AssetDatabase.CreateAsset(panelSettings, panelPath);\n        }\n        \n        // Use SerializedObject but check each property\n        SerializedObject pso = new SerializedObject(panelSettings);\n        SerializedProperty renderModeProp = pso.FindProperty(\"m_RenderMode\");\n        if (renderModeProp != null) renderModeProp.intValue = 1; // World\n        \n        SerializedProperty refResProp = pso.FindProperty(\"m_ReferenceResolution\");\n        if (refResProp != null) refResProp.vector2IntValue = new Vector2Int(1920, 1080);\n        \n        SerializedProperty scaleModeProp = pso.FindProperty(\"m_ScaleMode\");\n        if (scaleModeProp != null) scaleModeProp.intValue = 0; // Constant Pixel Size\n        \n        pso.ApplyModifiedProperties();\n        uiDoc.panelSettings = panelSettings;\n        \n        // 4. Save\n        result.RegisterObjectCreation(uiObj);\n        EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene, scenePath);\n        result.Log(\"Scene saved and setup complete.\");\n    }\n}\n","title":"Create VRCourseSelection scene (Robust)"},"raw_output":"Command was executed partially, but reported warnings or errors:\n[Log] Instantiated XR Origin.\n[Log] Added [CourseSelectionUI] component.\n[Error] System.ArgumentException: Object at index 0 is null\r\n  at (wrapper managed-to-native) UnityEditor.SerializedObject.InternalCreate_Injected(UnityEngine.Object[],intptr)\r\n  at UnityEditor.SerializedObject.InternalCreate (UnityEngine.Object[] monoObjs, UnityEngine.Object context) [0x00007] in <fa95cb502fe343b2a567dd611b37cd92>:0 \r\n  at UnityEditor.SerializedObject..ctor (UnityEngine.Object obj) [0x00006] in <fa95cb502fe343b2a567dd611b37cd92>:0 \r\n  at Unity.AI.Assistant.Agent.Dynamic.Extension.Editor.CommandScript.Execute (Unity.AI.Assistant.Agent.Dynamic.Extension.Editor.ExecutionResult result) [0x00188] in <698cf5b941ea4dcdacac3338cf98bea3>:0 \r\n  at Unity.AI.Assistant.Editor.RunCommand.AgentRunCommand.Execute (Unity.AI.Assistant.Agent.Dynamic.Extension.Editor.ExecutionResult& executionResult, System.String title) [0x00019] in .\\Library\\PackageCache\\com.unity.ai.assistant@1311ffcbb798\\Editor\\Assistant\\RunCommand\\AgentRunCommand.cs:46 \nConsider reverting changes that may have happened if you retry.","is_error":true}", "error": "Command was executed partially, but reported warnings or errors:
[Log] Instantiated XR Origin.
[Log] Added [CourseSelectionUI] component.
